file_insights.focus_shift: From event-driven dispatcher (polling → notify) to Zellij onboarding (bop init/doctor)
file_insights.content_structure: Overview + 5 sample outputs + implementation details + acceptance criteria + test results

patterns_discovered.description: bop init detects ZELLIJ_SESSION_NAME env var and prints different guidance based on whether Zellij is active
patterns_discovered.impact: Better UX for new users; automatic configuration discovery

patterns_discovered.description: bop doctor has hierarchical checks: tools → session → web client → adapters → cards → criteria → make check
patterns_discovered.impact: Users can identify exact failure points in their environment

patterns_discovered.description: --fast flag skips expensive make check, reducing doctor runtime significantly
patterns_discovered.impact: Quick troubleshooting without full test suite wait
One-time setup survives across multiple command invocations

gotchas_discovered.context: When run outside Zellij, env var is unset; special handling needed
gotchas_discovered.mitigation: Check `Option<String>` and provide helpful guidance instead of error

gotchas_discovered.context: Some adapters (goose, opencode) shown as missing; others present
gotchas_discovered.impact: Doctor command must gracefully handle missing optional adapters
gotchas_discovered.remediation: Document how to install missing adapters

gotchas_discovered.context: Port 8082 assumed; may not be configurable
gotchas_discovered.risk: Fails if user runs Zellij web client on different port

gotchas_discovered.context: Full test suite can be slow; no apparent timeout documented

approach_details.execution: Rewrote result.md with 5 realistic sample outputs covering: inside-Zellij, outside-Zellij, full-health, fast-health, and degraded scenarios
approach_details.coverage: Both happy path and fallback scenarios documented; all acceptance criteria explicitly verified
approach_details.quality_gate: make check passed (339 tests, no clippy warnings, proper formatting)

recommendations.recommendation: Add --json output mode to bop doctor
recommendations.rationale: Enable machine parsing and scripting; useful for CI/CD integration
goose, opencode shown as missing; users need guidance to fix
Hardcoded 8082 may fail if user changes Zellij web config

recommendations.recommendation: Add timeout to web client health check
recommendations.rationale: TCP connection attempt could hang indefinitely if port is blocked

recommendations.recommendation: Add --explain flag to doctor for verbose output
recommendations.rationale: Help users understand why checks pass/fail and how to fix issues
